title: Solar Gardens
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Solar Gardens''' was a beautiful park located within the [[Nubian Palace]] resort.  It was a popular tourist destination with locations for picnics or meeting places. A large [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] wall reflected sunlight into the Gardens and illuminated the entire park. This effect also provided a beautiful landscape for two restaurants that bordered the Solar Gardens. The gardens contained many exotic species of flora, including [[Floating archidia|floating archidias]].<ref>[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]</ref>
